numpy==1.26.4
opencv-python-headless==4.10.0.84
# Default CPU-only ONNX Runtime. For Intel GPU (ARC) acceleration do NOT edit
# this line: onnxruntime and onnxruntime-openvino provide the same `onnxruntime`
# package and cannot coexist. Instead build the image with FACE_GPU=openvino,
# which installs faces/requirements-openvino.txt (onnxruntime-openvino) in place
# of this file. See README-deploy.md "GPU acceleration for face recognition".
onnxruntime==1.18.1
insightface==0.7.3
hdbscan==0.8.40
scikit-learn==1.5.1
